title: Tilt Break (Old Damage Tilting)
description: Reverts the Damage Tilt back to the pre-1.19.4 era
body:
Supported Versions: Latest Version

 

Discord: StyStatic's Gaming Gamers


Introducing "Tilt Break" - the ultimate mod for Minecraft veterans who miss the good old days of gameplay! With this mod, you can say goodbye to the frustrating aspect of change that comes with Minecraft updates.

 

Tilt Break brings back an old feature by re-implementing a fixed bug that changes how the camera moves when you're attacked. No longer will you be forced to adapt to the new camera mechanics, as Tilt Break restores the classic camera tilt that you know and love.

 

With its simple yet effective fix, Tilt Break offers a seamless transition back to the gameplay experience that you remember. Whether you're a Minecraft veteran or simply prefer the old mechanics, this mod is sure to enhance your Minecraft experience. Say goodbye to frustration and hello to nostalgia with Tilt Break!

 

If you'd like to support me and the continued development of my mods, I recommend trying [StaticHost](https://static-host.com/)! It's a server company that I created myself that provides cheap, reliable servers with premium performance! You can use code STYSTATIC for 10% off your first month of an already cheap server! Choose us and we'll make sure you're treated well!
